productDisplayName: Puma Men Basket II Clean White Sports Shoes
description: These stylish Basket II Clean shoes from puma are a fresh take on the Basket Classics. These shoes are great or regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Perforations on sides and mesh tongue for enhanced breathability Synthetic tongue with woven texture on the tongue and behind heel Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo on the side and behind collar Formstripe on the side in high gloss finish Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning EVa midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole in a cross-thatch pattern for greater traction
